channel.title: Laser Dome Shows
channel.description: Upcoming events for Laser Dome Shows

item.title: Laser Billie Eilish
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Celebrate Billie Eilish’s Grammy-nominated catalog every Thursday at 7:30 p.m. in the Laser Dome.

Event details

item.title: Laser Rihanna
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Celebrate 10 years of Anti and all the chart-topping hits by Rihanna every Thursday at 9 p.m. in the Laser Dome.

Event details

item.title: Laser Nirvana
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Experience Washington’s biggest and influential grunge band, Nirvana, every Friday at 7:30 p.m. only in the Laser Dome.

Event details

item.title: Laser Daft Punk
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Join us Fridays at 9 p.m. for Laser Daft Punk! Hear one of the most influential acts in dance music in our Laser Dome.

Event details

item.title: Laser Tyler, The Creator
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 10:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

From Goblin to IGOR, experience the only laser show dedicated to Tyler, the Creator’s discography every Friday at 10:30 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser Stranger Things
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Relive the hit television show through its iconic soundtrack in the Laser Dome every Saturday at 7:30 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser Pink Floyd: Dark Side of the Moon
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Experience a laser show classic: Pink Floyd’s Dark Side of the Moon every Saturday at 9 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser Bad Bunny
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Relive the Super Bowl Halftime show and Album of the Year winner with a laser show dedicated to Bad Bunny every Saturday at 10:30 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser K-Pop
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Feel the beat of K-pop in a whole new way! PacSci’s Laser Show lights up the dome with dazzling visuals every Sunday at 7:30 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser Radiohead
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Experience Radiohead’s best of playlist spanning from their 30-year career every Sunday at 9 p.m.

Event details

item.title: Laser Billie Eilish
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Laser Dome, Pacific Science Center

Celebrate Billie Eilish’s Grammy-nominated catalog every Thursday at 7:30 p.m. in the Laser Dome.
